message:
docs(conformance): add 5 new official extensions to entry scan and validated manifest

Update the extension corpus metadata to include newly discovered official
pi-mono extensions from the latest entry point scan:

Extension entry scan (docs/extension-entry-scan.json):
- Total files: 1193 -> 1198 (+5)
- Entry points: 305 -> 310 (+5)
- High confidence: 1092 -> 1097 (+5)
- Official pi-mono: 67 -> 72 files, 60 -> 65 entry points
- New extensions: diff, files, negative-denied-caps, prompt-url-widget,
  and one additional entry point

Validated manifest (tests/ext_conformance/VALIDATED_MANIFEST.json):
- Add diff (tier 2): command registration, exec API usage
- Add files (tier 2): command registration, exec API usage
- Add negative-denied-caps: tool registration, event hooks, exec API —
  test fixture for policy denial conformance testing
- Update existing extension conformance tier assignments and capability
  declarations to reflect latest corpus analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
